_comment: Analyst-edited overlay for all six subsystems. TRL in report = technical performance band; rows below separate regulatory / manufacturing / integration judgments. Regenerate dashboard after edits; this file is not overwritten by run_trl_inference.py.

heat_transport.regulatory_readiness: Medium — test evidence exists (e.g., SPHERE context), but full reactor-qualification and acceptance pathway remains incomplete.
heat_transport.manufacturing_readiness: Medium — heat-pipe fabrication and quality control are plausible, but repeatability at reactor-spec tolerance is not yet fully evidenced.
heat_transport.integration_readiness: Medium — component/array behavior is promising; integrated in-reactor demonstration evidence is still limited.

reactor_core.regulatory_readiness: Medium-Low — fuel/moderator qualification and licensing artifacts are still evolving.
reactor_core.manufacturing_readiness: Medium — core fabrication path is defined, but broader production readiness and repeatability evidence are thin.
reactor_core.integration_readiness: Medium — strong modeling basis exists; integrated operational evidence remains thinner than component-level evidence.

power_conversion.regulatory_readiness: Medium — acceptance is tied to plant safety case and operational envelope definitions.
power_conversion.manufacturing_readiness: Medium-High — Stirling heritage is mature in adjacent domains; nuclear-site packaging/qualification remains less certain.
power_conversion.integration_readiness: Medium — coupling to realistic reactor thermal source and control scenarios is not yet strongly demonstrated in open records.

control_systems.regulatory_readiness: Low-Medium — digital I&C and autonomous-control acceptance is a primary licensing bottleneck.
control_systems.manufacturing_readiness: Medium — platform maturity is improving, but nuclear-grade V&V evidence is still developing.
control_systems.integration_readiness: Medium — testbed control results are useful, yet full reactor-site integration evidence remains limited.

safety_systems.regulatory_readiness: Medium — passive safety claims are conceptually strong, but formal licensing artifacts and acceptance evidence are still developing.
safety_systems.manufacturing_readiness: Medium — manufacturability is linked to primary system pathways, with limited explicit safety-component production evidence.
safety_systems.integration_readiness: Medium-Low — public evidence for integrated accident/transient performance is comparatively sparse.

grid_integration.regulatory_readiness: Medium — interconnect and site/deployment requirements are known but project-specific pathway evidence is still early.
grid_integration.manufacturing_readiness: Medium — many balance-of-plant elements use mature industrial supply chains.
grid_integration.integration_readiness: Low — end-user coupling demonstrations for MARVEL-class operation remain early-stage.
